title: Debug Galactus missing from congress-11 roster

log.context: Debug Galactus missing from congress-11 roster

The root cause is clear. Here is the full diagnosis:

---

**Root cause: Galactus never posted a round in congress #11, so it's excluded from `sessionParticipantIds`.**

The UI builds `sessionParticipantIds` (line 1515) by scanning `session.rounds` for distinct `identity` values (excluding `hiring-manager`). Congress #11's rounds contain: `the-kid`, `uncle-bob`, `pm`, `spengler`, `architect` — **Galactus has zero rounds**.
